body:
**Modpack needs [VCRuntime 141](https://learn.microsoft.com/cpp/windows/latest-supported-vc-redist?view=msvc-170#visual-studio-2015-2017-2019-and-2022) or game crashes on Windows**

**For macOS/Linux,please disable [ContingameIME](https://modrinth.com/mod/contingameime) to fix game crashes**

### Note: This modpack has a lower update priority than [Turtle's Modpack Series](https://modrinth.com/modpack/turtles-modpack)
# в›ЏпёЏMine & Craftрџ§±
## **Mine Or Craft? It's Up To You!**
### On this modpack,you can
Go on an adventure in the [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)рџЋ„![The Twilight Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55fef9859c0538ef705443c7c3fb6d7653b51422.png)

Sunbathe in the [Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)![The Aether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a98393192f3d906ba9ad3737baa46c09f06770d3.png)

Enjoy the [World Full of Potatoes](https://modrinth.com/mod/reimagining-potatoes)![The Poisonous Potatoes World](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84cd85d145832eb31a82da40ac12014daaca2c31.png)

Or [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/reimagining-potatoes) a big machine on your [Valkyrien Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies) ship!![Valkyrien Skies & Create](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9403c5df68fa6be23092dd5a3b7b0ddc31e3cbd.png)

And More!!!!![The Mod Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df342fc180da8cfa4bdbb7485f490c4eb44519e2.png)

**Just Download it and make your choice!**
